diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -26,18 +26,18 @@
                 param.requires_grad = True

                 

         self.conv = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=embed_dim, out_channels=256, kernel_size=9, padding=4),

+            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=embed_dim, out_channels=256, kernel_size=7, padding=3),

             nn.ReLU(),

-            nn.Dropout(0.1),

-            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=256, out_channels=256, kernel_size=9, padding=4),

+            nn.Dropout(0.2),

+            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=256, out_channels=256, kernel_size=7, padding=3),

             nn.ReLU(),

-            nn.Dropout(0.1)

+            nn.Dropout(0.2)

         )

         

         self.regressor = nn.Sequential(

             nn.Linear(256, 128),

             nn.ReLU(),

-            nn.Dropout(0.2),

+            nn.Dropout(0.3),

             nn.Linear(128, 1)

         )

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -66,16 +66,14 @@
     regressor_params = [p for p in model.regressor.parameters() if p.requires_grad]

     

     optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW([

-        {'params': esm_params, 'lr': 5e-5, 'weight_decay': 0.01},

-        {'params': conv_params + regressor_params, 'lr': 1e-3, 'weight_decay': 0.05}

+        {'params': esm_params, 'lr': 1e-4, 'weight_decay': 0.01},

+        {'params': conv_params + regressor_params, 'lr': 1e-3, 'weight_decay': 0.01}

     ])

     

-    epochs = 6

-    scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.OneCycleLR(

+    epochs = 7

+    scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(

         optimizer,

-        max_lr=[5e-5, 1e-3],

-        total_steps=epochs * len(train_loader),

-        pct_start=0.1

+        T_max=epochs * len(train_loader)

     )

     criterion = nn.MSELoss()

     scaler = torch.cuda.amp.GradScaler()

@@ -139,6 +137,7 @@
                 best_val_rho = rho

                 os.makedirs("checkpoints", exist_ok=True)

                 torch.save(model.state_dict(), "checkpoints/best.pt")

+                logger.info(f"Saved new best model with val_spearman={rho:.4f}")

 

 if __name__ == "__main__":

     train()
